member.name: T:TinyReactive.Exceptions.UnloadException
member.summary:
Error unloading the object.
Used in extensions.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener
member.summary: Used in all reactive objects as a reference to the listener method.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener`1
member.summary: Used in all reactive objects as a reference to the listener method.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener`2
member.summary: Used in all reactive objects as a reference to the listener method.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener`3
member.summary: Used in all reactive objects as a reference to the listener method.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListenerExtension
member.summary: Added the option to call Invoke for all Action nested within a LazyList.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListenerExtension.Invoke(TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList{TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener})
member.summary: Apply the changes to the LazyList and invoke all nested ActionListeners.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListenerExtension.Invoke``1(TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList{TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener{``0}},``0)
member.summary: Apply the changes to the LazyList and invoke all nested ActionListeners.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListenerExtension.Invoke``2(TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList{TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener{``0,``1}},``0,``1)
member.summary: Apply the changes to the LazyList and invoke all nested ActionListeners.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListenerExtension.Invoke``3(TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList{TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener{``0,``1,``2}},``0,``1,``2)
member.summary: Apply the changes to the LazyList and invoke all nested ActionListeners.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.Fields.InputChanger`1
member.summary: Modifies the value passed by reference.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.InputChanger`1.id
member.summary: Unique identifier automatically assigned to this instance.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.InputChanger`1.listeners
member.summary: List of listeners that receive the new value on change.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.InputChanger`1.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new instance and initializes the listener lists.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.InputChanger`1.Send(`0@)
member.summary: Invoke all subscribed listeners.
member.param: The value that needs to be modified.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.InputChanger`1.Send(`0[])
member.summary: Invoke all subscribed listeners.
member.param: Values that need to be modified.

member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when a Send request.

member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when a Send request.

member.summary: Removes a previously added listener.

member.summary: Clears all listener lists.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.Fields.InputListener
member.summary: A parameterless listener that allows subscribing and triggering actions.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.InputListener.id
member.summary: Unique identifier automatically assigned to this instance.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.InputListener.listeners
member.summary: List of parameterless listeners invoked on any value change.

member.summary: Creates a new instance and initializes the listener list.
member.param: Initial capacity of the internal listener list.

member.summary: Creates a new instance and adds the specified listener.

member.summary: Creates a new instance, adds the specified listener, and links it to an unload pool.

member.summary: Invokes all subscribed listeners.

member.summary: A listener that allows subscribing and triggering actions with a single value.

member.summary: Unique identifier automatically assigned to this instance.

member.summary: List of parameterless listeners invoked on any value change.

member.summary: Creates a new instance and adds the specified listener.

member.summary: Creates a new instance, adds the specified listener, and links it to an unload pool.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.InputListener`1.Send(`0)
member.summary: Invokes all subscribed listeners with the specified value.
member.param: The value to pass to the listeners.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.InputListener`1.Send(`0[])
member.summary: Invokes all subscribed listeners for each specified value.
member.param: The values to pass to the listeners.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.InputListener`1.AddListener(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener)
member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when triggered.

member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when triggered.

member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when triggered, receiving the value.

member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when triggered, receiving the value.

member.summary: Adds a listener that will be called when the triggered value is of the specified type.
member.typeparam: The expected subtype of T that triggers the listener.

member.summary: Adds a listener that will be called when the triggered value is of the specified type.
member.typeparam: The expected subtype of T that triggers the listener.

member.summary: Removes a previously added listener.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.Fields.InputSingleListener
member.summary: Invokes listeners sequentially until one returns the expected result.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.InputSingleListener.id
member.summary: Unique identifier automatically assigned to this instance.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.InputSingleListener.listeners
member.summary: List of listeners that return a boolean value.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.InputSingleListener.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new instance and initializes the listener list.
member.param: Initial capacity of the internal listener list.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.InputSingleListener.Send(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Invokes all subscribed listeners until one returns the expected result.
member.param: The boolean result that stops further listener invocation.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.InputSingleListener.AddListener(System.Func{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.InputSingleListener.AddListener``1(System.Func{System.Boolean},``0)
member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.InputSingleListener.RemoveListener(System.Func{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Removes a previously added listener.

member.summary: Clears all listener lists.

member.summary: Returns the current unique .

member.summary: Compares an object by .

member.name: T:TinyReactive.Fields.IValue`1
member.summary: Wrapper for returning a specific type of value.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.IValue`1.value
member.summary: Target type.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1
member.summary: Internal list that defers synchronization until Apply is called, optimizing batch operations.
member.typeparam: The type of the stored elements.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of synchronized elements.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.CountCache
member.summary: Gets the number of elements including pending changes.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.isDirty
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the cache has un-applied changes.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.IsReadOnly
member.summary: Always returns False.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1._elements
member.summary: Internal list storing the synchronized elements.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1._cache
member.summary: Internal list storing the pending changes.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets or sets the element at the specified index in the synchronized list.
member.param: The zero-based index of the element to get or set.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new instance and initializes the internal lists.
member.param: Initial capacity of the internal lists.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates through the synchronized elements.
member.returns: An enumerator for the synchronized elements.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.System#Collections#IEnumerable#GetEnumerator
member.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates through the synchronized elements.
member.returns: An enumerator for the synchronized elements.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.Add(`0)
member.summary: Adds an element to the pending cache and marks the list as dirty.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.IndexOf(`0)
member.summary: Determines the index of a specific element in the pending cache.
member.param: The object to locate in the cache.
member.returns: The index of the element if found; otherwise, -1.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.Insert(System.Int32,`0)
member.summary: Inserts an element into the pending cache at the specified index and marks the list as dirty.
member.param: The zero-based index at which the element should be inserted.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.Clear
member.summary: Clears the pending cache and marks the list as dirty.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.Contains(`0)
member.summary: Determines whether the pending cache contains a specific element.
member.param: The object to locate in the cache.
member.returns: True if the element is found in the cache; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.CopyTo(`0[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Copies the synchronized elements to an array, starting at a particular array index.
member.param: The one-dimensional array that is the destination of the elements.
The zero-based index in the array at which copying begins.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.RemoveAt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes the element at the specified index from the pending cache and marks the list as dirty.
member.param: The zero-based index of the element to remove.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.Remove(`0)
member.summary: Removes the first occurrence of a specific element from the pending cache and marks the list as dirty.
member.returns: True if the element was successfully removed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.LazyList`1.Apply
member.summary: Synchronizes the pending cache to the main list and clears the dirty flag.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1
member.summary: Observable value T, allows subscribing to changes.
member.typeparam: The type of the stored value.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.value
member.summary: Current value, can be changed via or .

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.id
member.summary: Unique identifier automatically assigned to this instance.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.listeners
member.summary: List of parameterless listeners invoked on any value change.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.listenersValue
member.summary: List of listeners that receive the new value on change.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.listenersChange
member.summary: List of listeners that receive both the old and new value on change.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.#ctor(`0,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new instance and initializes the listener lists.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.SetSilent(`0)
member.summary: Sets a new value without notifying any listeners.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.Set(`0)
member.summary: Sets a new value and notifies all subscribed listeners.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.AddListener(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener)
member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when the value changes.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.AddListener``1(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener,``0)
member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when the value changes.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.AddListener(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener{`0})
member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when the value changes.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.AddListener``1(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener{`0},``0)
member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when the value changes.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.AddListener(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener{`0,`0})
member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when the value changes.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.AddListener``1(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener{`0,`0},``0)
member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when the value changes.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.AddListenerValue``1(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener,TinyReactive.IUnloadLink)
member.summary: Adds a listener that will be called when the value changes to the specified type.
member.typeparam: The expected subtype of T that triggers the listener.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.AddListenerValue``1(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener{``0},TinyReactive.IUnloadLink)
member.summary: Adds a listener that will be called when the value changes to the specified type.
member.typeparam: The expected subtype of T that triggers the listener.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.AddListenerFirst(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener)
member.summary: Adds the listener to the beginning of the list that will be called when the value changes.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed`1.AddListenerFirst``1(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener,``0)
member.summary: Adds the listener to the beginning of the list that will be called when the value changes.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed
member.summary: Helper class holding the global identifier counter shared by all observed instances and the default listener list capacity constant.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed._globalId
member.summary: Global counter used to assign unique identifiers.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.Observed.CAPACITY
member.summary: Default capacity for the internal listener lists.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2
member.summary: Observable dictionary, allows subscribing to add and remove operations.
member.typeparam: The type of the keys in the dictionary.
The type of the values in the dictionary.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of elements contained in the dictionary.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.Keys
member.summary: Gets a collection containing the keys of the dictionary.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.Values
member.summary: Gets a collection containing the values of the dictionary.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.IsReadOnly
member.summary: Always returns False.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.id
member.summary: Unique identifier automatically assigned to this instance.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.onAdd
member.summary: List of parameterless listeners invoked on add operation.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.onAddWithValue
member.summary: List of listeners that receive the added value on add operation.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.onRemove
member.summary: List of parameterless listeners invoked on remove operation.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.onRemoveWithValue
member.summary: List of listeners that receive the removed value on remove operation.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.dictionary
member.summary: Internal dictionary storing the elements.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new instance and initializes the listener lists.
member.param: Initial capacity of the internal dictionary and listener lists.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{`0,`1},System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new instance from a dictionary and initializes the listener lists.
member.param: Initial capacity of the internal listener lists.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.Item(`0)
member.summary: Gets or sets the value associated with the specified key. Setting a value notifies listeners.
member.param: The key of the value to get or set.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.Add(System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{`0,`1})
member.summary: Adds an element with the provided key and value to the dictionary and notifies listeners.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.Add(`0,`1)
member.summary: Adds an element with the provided key and value to the dictionary and notifies listeners.
member.param: The key of the element to add.
The value of the element to add.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.Remove(System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{`0,`1})
member.summary: Removes the element with the specified key from the dictionary and notifies listeners.
member.returns: True if the element is successfully removed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.Remove(`0)
member.summary: Removes the element with the specified key from the dictionary and notifies listeners.
member.param: The key of the element to remove.
member.returns: True if the element is successfully removed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.RemoveRange(System.Collections.Generic.List{`1})
member.summary: Removes elements matching the specified values from the dictionary and notifies listeners.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.Clear
member.summary: Removes all elements from the dictionary and resets the count.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.Contains(System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{`0,`1})
member.summary: Determines whether the dictionary contains a specific key-value pair.
member.param: The key-value pair to locate in the dictionary.
member.returns: True if the key-value pair is found; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.TryGetValue(`0,`1@)
member.summary: Gets the value associated with the specified key.
member.param: The key whose value to get.
When this method returns, the value associated with the specified key, if the key is found; otherwise, the default value for the type of the value parameter.
member.returns: True if the dictionary contains an element with the specified key; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.ContainsKey(`0)
member.summary: Determines whether the dictionary contains the specified key.
member.param: The key to locate in the dictionary.
member.returns: True if the dictionary contains an element with the key; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.CopyTo(System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{`0,`1}[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Copies the elements of the dictionary to an array, starting at a particular array index.
member.param: The one-dimensional array that is the destination of the elements.
The zero-based index in the array at which copying begins.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates through the dictionary.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedDictionary`2.System#Collections#IEnumerable#GetEnumerator
member.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates through the dictionary.

member.typeparam: The expected subtype of TValue that triggers the listener.

member.summary: Extension methods for Observed.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.Increment(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Int32})
member.summary: Increases the current value by 1.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.Increment(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Single})
member.summary: Increases the current value by 1.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.Decrement(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Int32})
member.summary: Decreases the current value by 1.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.Decrement(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Single})
member.summary: Decreases the current value by 1.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.AddValue(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Int32},System.Int32)
member.summary: Increases the current value.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.AddValueSilent(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Int32},System.Int32)
member.summary: Increases the current value.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.AddValueIfAvailable(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Int32},System.Int32)
member.summary: Increases the current value if it is not equal to 0.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.AddValueMax(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Int32},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Increases the current value to the specified maximum limit.

member.summary: Increases the current value.

member.summary: Increases the current value.

member.summary: Increases the current value if it is not equal to 0.

member.summary: Increases the current value to the specified maximum limit.

member.summary: Increases the current value.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.SubtractValue(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Int32},System.Int32)

member.summary: Decreases the current value.

member.summary: Decreases the current value if it is not equal to 0.

member.summary: Decreases the current value to the specified minimum limit if it is not equal to 0.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.SubtractValueLimit(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Int32},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Decreases the current value to the specified minimum limit.

member.summary: Decreases the current value.

member.summary: Decreases the current value to the specified minimum limit if it is not equal to 0.

member.summary: Decreases the current value to the specified minimum limit.

member.summary: Get the value after it has been changed.
member.typeparam: The type of the stored value.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.TrySet``1(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{``0},``0)
member.summary: Set a new value if it is not equal to the current one.
member.typeparam: The type of the stored value.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.SubtractSecond(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.TimeSpan},System.Int32)
member.summary: Subtract the specified number of seconds.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.TrySetWhen``1(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{``0},``0,``0)
member.summary: Set a new value if the current value is equal to the expected value.
member.typeparam: The type of the stored value.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.TrySetNext(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Int32},System.Int32)
member.summary: Set the value if it is greater than the current one.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.TrySetNext(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Single},System.Single)
member.summary: Set the value if it is greater than the current one.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.TrySetMin(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Single},System.Single[])
member.summary: Set the minimum value from the passed array.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.TrySetMin(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Int32},System.Int32[])
member.summary: Set the minimum value from the passed array.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.TrySetClamp(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Int32},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Set the value to a value between the specified values.

member.summary: Set the maximum value from the passed array.

member.summary: Set the maximum value from the passed array.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.TrySetPrevious(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Int32},System.Int32)
member.summary: Set the value if it is less than the current one.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.TrySetPrevious(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Single},System.Single)
member.summary: Set the value if it is less than the current one.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedExtension.Toggle(TinyReactive.Fields.Observed{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Flips the current boolean value.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1
member.summary: Observable list, allows subscribing to add, remove, and clear operations.
member.typeparam: The type of the stored elements.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of elements contained in the list.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.Current
member.summary: Gets the element in the collection at the current position of the enumerator.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.System#Collections#IEnumerator#Current
member.summary: Gets the element in the collection at the current position of the enumerator.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.IsReadOnly
member.summary: Always returns False.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.id
member.summary: Unique identifier automatically assigned to this instance.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.onAdd
member.summary: List of parameterless listeners invoked on add operation.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.onAddWithValue
member.summary: List of listeners that receive the added value on add operation.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.onRemove
member.summary: List of parameterless listeners invoked on remove operation.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.onRemoveWithValue
member.summary: List of listeners that receive the removed value on remove operation.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.onClear
member.summary: List of parameterless listeners invoked on clear operation.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.list
member.summary: Internal list storing the elements.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1._currentId
member.summary: Current index for the enumerator.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new instance and initializes the listener lists.
member.param: Initial capacity of the internal listener lists.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.#ctor(`0[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new instance from an array and initializes the listener lists.
member.param: Initial capacity of the internal listener lists.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{`0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new instance from a list and initializes the listener lists.
member.param: Initial capacity of the internal listener lists.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets or sets the element at the specified index. Setting a value notifies listeners.
member.param: The zero-based index of the element to get or set.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.Add(`0[])
member.summary: Adds an array of elements to the end of the list and notifies listeners.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.Add(`0)
member.summary: Adds an element to the end of the list and notifies listeners.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.Remove(`0[])
member.summary: Removes the first occurrence of specific elements from the list and notifies listeners.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.Remove(`0)
member.summary: Removes the first occurrence of a specific element from the list and notifies listeners.
member.returns: True if the element was successfully removed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.RemoveAll
member.summary: Removes all elements individually and notifies listeners for each removal.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.Clear
member.summary: Removes all elements from the list and notifies listeners.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.IndexOf(`0)
member.summary: Determines the index of a specific element in the list.
member.param: The object to locate in the list.
member.returns: The index of the element if found; otherwise, -1.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.Insert(System.Int32,`0)
member.summary: Inserts an element into the list at the specified index and notifies listeners.
member.param: The zero-based index at which the element should be inserted.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.Contains(`0)
member.summary: Determines whether the list contains a specific element.
member.param: The object to locate in the list.
member.returns: True if the element is found in the list; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.CopyTo(`0[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Copies the elements of the list to an array, starting at a particular array index.
member.param: The one-dimensional array that is the destination of the elements.
The zero-based index in the array at which copying begins.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.RemoveAt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes the element at the specified index of the list and notifies listeners.
member.param: The zero-based index of the element to remove.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.AddOnAddListener(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener)
member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when an element is added.

member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when an element is added.

member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when an element is added, receiving the added value.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.RemoveOnAddListener(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener)
member.summary: Removes a previously added listener from the list.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.RemoveOnAddListener(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener{`0})
member.summary: Removes a previously added listener from the list.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.AddOnRemoveListener(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener)
member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when an element is removed.

member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when an element is removed.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.AddOnRemoveListener(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener{`0})
member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when an element is removed, receiving the removed value.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.AddOnRemoveListener``1(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener{`0},``0)
member.summary: Adds a listener that will be invoked when an element is removed, receiving the removed value.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.RemoveOnRemoveListener(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener)
member.summary: Removes a previously added listener for removing an item from the list.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.ObservedList`1.RemoveOnRemoveListener(TinyReactive.Fields.ActionListener{`0})
member.summary: Removes a previously added listener for removing an item from the list.

member.summary: Removes a previously added list-clearing listener.

member.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates through the list.

member.summary: Resets the enumerator value.

member.summary: Calls Reset and resets the enumerator value.

member.summary: Extension methods for UnloadPool and IUnload.

member.summary: Unloads the list if needed.
member.returns: Returns False if the list does not exist or has been unloaded earlier.

member.summary: Unload all items in the collection, if needed.

member.summary: Unload all items in the collection.

member.summary: Unload the current item, if needed.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.UnloadExtension.Reset(TinyReactive.UnloadPool)
member.summary: Unloads the current list and returns null.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.UnloadExtension.Recreate(TinyReactive.UnloadPool,TinyReactive.UnloadPool@)
member.summary: Unload the current list, if it exists, and return a new object.
member.param: A new or cleared unload list.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.UnloadExtension.Update(TinyReactive.UnloadPool,TinyReactive.UnloadPool@,TinyReactive.UnloadPool@)
member.summary: Unload the current list and return the reference.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.UnloadExtension.Update(TinyReactive.UnloadPool,TinyReactive.UnloadPool@)
member.summary: Unload the current list and return the reference. To simplify potential single-line expressions.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.Fields.UnloadExtension.Recreate(TinyReactive.UnloadPool)
member.summary: Unload the current list, if it exists, and return a new object.
member.returns: A new or cleared unload list.

member.summary: Add the item to the list for unloading.
member.param: A reference to the list for unloading.

member.summary: Used in InputChanger to modify an unmanaged value by passing it by reference.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.IUnload
member.summary: Flag for unsubscribing from events and stopping asynchronous actions in case of scene unloading.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.IUnload.Unload
member.summary: Place to unsubscribe from events and stop asynchronous actions.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.IUnloadLink
member.summary: Designates the object as a pool for unloading objects.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.IUnloadLink.Add``1(``0)
member.summary: Add an object to the Pool.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.UnloadAction
member.summary: Container for action participating in unload resources.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.UnloadAction._action
member.summary: Reference to the unload event.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.UnloadAction.#ctor(System.Action)
member.summary: Create action container.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.UnloadAction.Unload
member.summary: Invoke referenced action event.

member.name: T:TinyReactive.UnloadPool
member.summary: Pool of resources requiring unloading, for unsubscribing from events and stopping asynchronous actions in case of scene unloading.

member.name: P:TinyReactive.UnloadPool.isUnloaded
member.summary: Pool lifetime status. Becomes True after Unload, resets to False after ResetStatus.

member.name: F:TinyReactive.UnloadPool._pool
member.summary: List of abstract references for unloading.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.UnloadPool.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Create empty unload pool.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.UnloadPool.Add(TinyReactive.IUnload[])
member.summary: Add an object to the Pool.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.UnloadPool.Remove``1(``0)
member.summary: Remove the object from the pool.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.UnloadPool.Remove(TinyReactive.IUnload[])
member.summary: Remove objects from the pool.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.UnloadPool.ResetStatus
member.summary: Reset the unloaded status.

member.name: M:TinyReactive.UnloadPool.Unload
member.summary: Call Unload on all objects.
